---
name: Exercise Suggestion
about: Suggest a new hands-on exercise for a grade
title: "[EXERCISE] Grade X — short description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Which grade is this for?

e.g. Grade 6 — Advanced Techniques

## Exercise title

e.g. Interactive Rebase to squash commits

## Proposed exercise

Write it as it would appear in the grade's `README.md`:

```markdown
### Exercise X.Y — Title

Short intro sentence.

```bash
# commands here
```

> **Tip:** optional hint for students
```

## Why is this a good addition?

What concept does it reinforce? What gap does it fill?

## Tested on

- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Git version: ___________
